items.title: Lucid Motors denies report it’s considering bankruptcy
items.summary: The company said the "rumors are completely false" after its stock sank more than 50% on a report that it was weighing the option.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: US military sent explosive drone boats into combat for the first time
items.summary: US military’s drone boats struck an Iranian naval port as war heats up again.
